channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-24 16:00 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Feminization of the West creates the fertile landscape for suicidal empathy.
item.description: Feminization of the West creates the fertile landscape for suicidal empathy.

item.title: @elonmusk: With FSD v14.3.2, we unified the model between Actually Smart Summon, FSD & Robotaxi for more capabl...
item.description: With FSD v14.3.2, we unified the model between Actually Smart Summon, FSD & Robotaxi for more capable & reliable behavior

item.title: @elonmusk: Our newest voice model is 20+ points ahead of the nearest competitor on Sierra's leaderboard. Pretty...
item.description: Our newest voice model is 20+ points ahead of the nearest competitor on Sierra's leaderboard. Pretty massive upgrade from our OG model from December, with significantly improved realism and tool calling capabilities.

item.title: @elonmusk: I bought a Tesla. Never thought I’d get an electric vehicle, but took a ride in a buddy’s Tesla and ...
item.description: I bought a Tesla. Never thought I’d get an electric vehicle, but took a ride in a buddy’s Tesla and changed my mind. I’ve been using the supervised self-driving mode for my daily commute into DC. It’s pretty amazing. Today the car suddenly moved into the left lane, very abruptly. In that split second a very large piece of debris blew into the lane I had been in. The Tesla self driving system saw what I couldn’t see. When I drive I can only see from the perspective of the driver side front seat. The Tesla has multiple censors with different angles of view. It saw what I couldn’t. Importantly, even I I had seen it at the same time, the split second that it would have taken me to check blind spots and then consciously make the decision to move over would have taken too long. The Tesla knew all these variables simultaneously and almost instantly and was able to avoid impact safely. Well done@elonmuskand@Teslateam.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla AI is where the rubber hits the road. “Make no mistakes” is not just a meme joke for self-driv...
item.description: Tesla AI is where the rubber hits the road. “Make no mistakes” is not just a meme joke for self-driving AI. Tesla AI saves lives every day, at large scale. No other AI team can yet make that claim.

item.title: @elonmusk: John Stossel exposing the Southern Poverty Law Center for actually being a hate group back in 2018.
item.description: John Stossel exposing the Southern Poverty Law Center for actually being a hate group back in 2018.
